title: Nginx WebSocket Proxy Example
verification_setup: Install Nginx on a staging host.
Replace the sample upstream with a real WebSocket service before validation.
Keep proxy_http_version 1.1 explicit during validation so the config behaves consistently across mixed Nginx versions.
verification_command: Manual verification only; see README.md for the staging checklist.
verification_notes: Not executed. The example follows the official Nginx WebSocket proxying guidance, but it still requires nginx -t and a real WebSocket upstream on a staging host before use.
